category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Hungary EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入匈牙利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入匈牙利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Hungary (MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, AFIR obligations, electrical protection-device requirements, and national installation rules. Hungary is a landlocked EU member state with a 230/400 V 50 Hz grid and significant EV infrastructure investment linked to its role as a Central European automotive hub.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、AFIR义务、保护装置要求和国家安装规则。匈牙利是欧盟内陆成员国，电网为230/400 V 50 Hz，作为中欧汽车制造中心拥有大量电动汽车基础设施投资。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、AFIR義務、保護裝置要求和國家安裝規則。匈牙利是歐盟內陸成員國，電網為230/400 V 50 Hz，作為中歐汽車製造中心擁有大量電動汽車基礎設施投資。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Hungary (MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Hungary-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented through Hungarian and EU member-state practice, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection per IEC 60364-7-722, and MEKH/MAVIR installation and grid-operator coordination. Hungary operates on 230/400 V 50 Hz; Chinese charger firmware and protection thresholds calibrated to China's 220/380 V baseline must be revalidated. Hungary is landlocked — EVSE import logistics run via Koper (Slovenia), Rijeka (Croatia), or Hamburg (Germany). Hungarian-language documentation is expected for local installation permits.
answer_first.zh: 对于匈牙利，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、匈牙利及欧盟成员国实施下的AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、符合IEC 60364-7-722的RCD/RDC保护，以及MEKH/MAVIR并网/安装协调要求。匈牙利电网为230/400 V 50 Hz；按中国220/380 V基线校准的充电桩固件和保护阈值须重新验证。匈牙利为内陆国——充电设备进口物流经科佩尔（斯洛文尼亚）、里耶卡（克罗地亚）或汉堡（德国）港口。当地安装许可通常需要匈牙利语文件。
answer_first.zht: 對於匈牙利，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2接口一致性、匈牙利及歐盟成員國實施下的AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、符合IEC 60364-7-722的RCD/RDC保護，以及MEKH/MAVIR併網/安裝協調要求。匈牙利電網為230/400 V 50 Hz；按中國220/380 V基線校準的充電樁韌體和保護閾值須重新驗證。匈牙利為內陸國——充電設備進口物流經科佩爾（斯洛文尼亞）、里耶卡（克羅埃西亞）或漢堡（德國）港口。當地安裝許可通常需要匈牙利語文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
